chunks.title: David's Vow for the Ark
chunks.reason: David recounts his personal oath to find a dwelling place for God.

chunks.title: Call to Worship at Zion
chunks.reason: The community responds to the vow and calls for God's presence.

chunks.title: The Davidic Covenant
chunks.reason: God's sworn promise to establish David's lineage on the throne.

chunks.title: God's Choice of Zion
chunks.reason: God declares His choice of Zion and promises blessing to the city and David.
